tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Absolutely (Story of a Girl) by Nine Days
Tabbed by: Brian Jenkins

[ch]Cadd9[/ch]           x32033
[ch]G[/ch]               320033
[ch]A7sus4[/ch]          x02233
[ch]D[/ch]               xx0232
[ch]Bm[/ch]              x24432
[ch]Em7[/ch]             022033
[ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]        200233


[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
This is the story of a girl,[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A7sus4[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
who cried a river and drowned the whole world[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
and while she looks so sad in photographs,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
I absolutely love her[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
when she smiles[/tab]


[1st Verse]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
How many days in a year[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
she woke up with hope but she only found tears[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
And I can be so insincere[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
making the promises never for real[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
As long as she stands there waiting[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Wearin' the holes in the soles of her shoes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
How many days disappear[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
You look in the mirror, so how do you choose[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
Your clothes never wear as well the next day[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
and your hair never falls in quite the same way,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]             [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
you never seem to run out of things to say[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
This is the story of a girl[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A7sus4[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
who cried a river and drowned the whole world[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
and while she looks so sad in photographs,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
I absolutely love her[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
when she smiles[/tab]


[2nd Verse]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
How many lovers would stay[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
just to put up with this everyday and all day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
How did we wind up this way,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
watching our mouths for the words that we say[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
As long as we stand here waiting[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
wearing the clothes of the souls that we choose[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
How do we get there today[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]D[/ch]
When we're walking too far for the price of our shoes[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
Your clothes never wear as well the next day[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
and your hair never falls in quite the same way,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]             [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
you never seem to run out of things to say[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
This is the story of a girl[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A7sus4[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
who cried a river and drowned the whole world[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
and while she looks so sad in photographs,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
I absolutely love her[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
when she smiles[/tab]


[Interlude]

[ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]A7sus4[/ch]


[Solo]

[ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  x4


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]
Your clothes never wear as well the next day[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
and your hair never falls in quite the same way,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]Dsus4/F#[/ch]             [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
you never seem to run out of things to say[/tab]


[Chorus/Outro]

[tab]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
This is the story of a girl[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A7sus4[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
who cried a river and drowned the whole world[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
and while she looks so sad in photographs,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
I absolutely love her[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
This is the story of a girl[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A7sus4[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
who's pretty face she hid from the world[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
and while she looks so sad and lonely there,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
I absolutely love her[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
This is the story of a girl[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A7sus4[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
who cried a river and drowned the whole world[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
and while she looks so sad in photographs,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A7sus4[/ch]
I absolutely love her,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
when she smiles,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
when she smiles[/tab]
